maps.Mirage: Balanced aim-duel map. High-precision sightlines favor AWPers and high-HS riflers.
maps.Inferno: Utility-heavy and narrow. High spray frequency. Lowers HS potential but boosts raw Kills.
maps.Nuke: CT-Sided verticality. Quick rotations. Favors tactical crosshair placement and high intensity.
maps.Ancient: Jungle-themed. High foliage. Favor aggressive entry pathing and high-KPR firepower.
maps.Anubis: Re-added Jan 2026. Wide-open mid and fast rotations. T-Sided bias favors raw aggression.
maps.Dust 2: The aim-duel capital. Longest sightlines in the pool. Massive boost for AWPers.
maps.Overpass: Highly tactical. Long-range sightlines mixed with tight park chokes. High complexity.

team_styles.Team Vitality: World Rank #1. Total tactical dominance. Built around the ropz/ZywOo duo. High-precision spacing and the most efficient utility trades in the world.
team_styles.Natus Vincere: Disciplined Methodical System. Heavily micro-managed by Aleksib/B1ad3. Emphasis on mid-round resets and youth firepower from makazze.
team_styles.FURIA: Tactical Brazilian Aggression. Transitioned under FalleN to a veteran-led, calculated aggressive style. High focus on site-anchoring and late-round pivots.
team_styles.PARIVISION: Jame-Style Defensive. Ultra-methodical with a heavy 'save-culture.' Rounds often go to the 10-second mark. Extremely low-variance and predictable pace.
team_styles.Team Falcons: Superstar Firepower Core. Led by NiKo and m0NESY. High-risk individualistic playstyle that relies on opening duel percentages to break rounds.
team_styles.Aurora: Turkish Aim-Heavy. MAJ3R's system focuses on XANTARES/woxic's explosive entry capabilities. Fast executes and aggressive T-side map control.
team_styles.The MongolZ: High-Tempo Asian Aggression. Unique utility combinations and fearless trading. High-intensity style that punishes passive defensive setups.
team_styles.MOUZ: Mechanical Efficiency. A young, high-fragging roster (Jimpphat/Spinx) that excels on modern maps. High success rate in 2v2 and 3v3 clutch situations.
team_styles.Team Spirit: Hybrid Aggression. Built around donk's hyper-aggressive entries and sh1ro's methodical AWP anchoring. magixx now leads as a tactical IGL.
team_styles.Astralis: Structured Rebuild. HooXi-led tactical system focusing on trade-fragging and jabbi's positioning. High-discipline, low-chaos approach.
team_styles.FaZe Clan: Tactical Individualistic. The 'Karrigan Magic' era continues with Twistzz's return. Relies on mid-round reads and high-ceiling clutch players like frozen and broky.
team_styles.G2 Esports: Aggressive Tactical Rebuild. sAw's system focuses on SunPayus's patient AWPing and the explosive entry potential of malbsMd.
team_styles.Team Liquid: Firepower Hybrid. siuhy's European structure mixed with NA veteran experience (EliGE/NAF). High emphasis on mid-lane control and AWP utility.

roles.Rifler: Primary engagement player. High volume of headshots and entry duels.
roles.AWPer: Sniper role. Focuses on center-of-mass kills. Naturally lower Headshot % but high survival.

tournaments.S-Tier (Major/Cologne): Maximum pressure. Teams strictly follow the tactical meta. Lowest volatility. High utility efficiency.
tournaments.A-Tier (Pro League/Online): High level play but slightly higher variance. Teams may experiment with new map setups.
tournaments.B-Tier (Regional/Qualifiers): High volatility. Chaotic playstyles. Individual hero-plays often override tactical structure. Higher upset potential.
